hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO ROI_CoverLetterCore ( ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor_Seq, ROI_LetterTemplateFile_Seq, Notes, LetterType, Queue_Password, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version ) VALUES ( :requestId, :requestorId, :letterTemplateId, :note, :templateType, :queuePassword, :createdDt, :createdBy, :modifiedDt, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_Patients ( ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq, ROI_Patients_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version ) VALUES (?0, ?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6);

INSERT INTO ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore ( ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version ) VALUES (?0, ?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6);

SELECT letter.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq id, letter.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, letter.ROI_RequestCoreRequestor_Seq requestorId, letter.ROI_LetterTemplateFile_Seq letterTemplateId, letter.Notes notes, letter.LetterType letterType, letter.Queue_Password queuePassword, letter.Created_Dt createdDt, letter.Created_By_Seq createdBy, letter.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, letter.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy FROM ROI_CoverLetterCore letter WHERE letter.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq = :coverLetterId

SELECT coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, patient.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, 0 supplementalId, patient.MRN mrn, patient.Facility facility, patient.NAME name, patient.dob dob, patient.SEX gender,
patient.SSN ssn, patient.EPN epn, patient.VIP vip, patient.LOCKOUT patientLocked, 0 encounterLocked, 1 hpf,
null createdDt, 0 createdBy, null modifiedDt, 0 modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient, cabinet..ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_Patients letter WHERE patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = letter.ROI_Patients_Seq and letter.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq = :coverLetterId

SELECT coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq supplementalId, supp.MRN mrn, supp.Facility facility, (case when supp.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else supp.LASTNAME end + case when supp.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when supp.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + supp.FIRSTNAME end) as name, supp.dob dob, supp.GENDER gender,
supp.SSN ssn, supp.EPN epn, supp.VIP vip, supp.patientLocked patientLocked, supp.encounterLocked encounterLocked, 0 hpf,
supp.Created_Dt createdDt, supp.Created_By_Seq createdBy, supp.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, supp.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supp, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore coreToPatient, cabinet..ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore letter WHERE supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = letter.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and letter.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq = :coverLetterId

DELETE patients FROM ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_Patients patients, ROI_CoverLetterCore letter WHERE letter.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq= patients.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq and letter.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

DELETE patients FROM ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patients, ROI_CoverLetterCore letter WHERE letter.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq= patients.ROI_CoverLetterCore_Seq and letter.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
DELETE patients FROM ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_Patients patients WHERE patients.ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE patients FROM ROI_CoverLetterCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patients WHERE patients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
